name_en: 👄FENDI New iconic Baguette medium handbag, black canvas material with embossed FF pattern in the same color, trimmed with leather, featuring FF clasp. Features front flap, magnetic snap, internal pocket, zip pocket, and vintage gold metal hardware. This bag comes with a removable handle and leather shoulder strap with laser-cut Baguette text, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Model: FD8600, Dimensions: 27*6*15cm
